description:
HealthMonitorService uses legacy status names that don't match the canonical 6-status system:
- `remediateStuckFeature()` resets to 'pending' (should be 'backlog')
- `isFeatureRetryable()` checks for status === 'failed' (should be 'blocked')

File: apps/server/src/services/health-monitor-service.ts

Acceptance criteria:
- All status references use canonical names (backlog, in_progress, review, blocked, done, verified)
- No references to 'pending', 'failed', 'running', 'completed' in health monitor
- Existing tests pass
title: Fix HealthMonitor legacy status names
